fundamentals.name: State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The trust seeks to achieve its investment objective by holding a portfolio of the common stocks that are included in the index (the “Portfolio”), with the weight of each stock in the Portfolio substantially corresponding to the weight of such stock in the index.

news.paragraph: The trust seeks to achieve its investment objective by holding a portfolio of the common stocks that are included in the index (the “Portfolio”), with the weight of each stock in the Portfolio substantially corresponding to the weight of such stock in the index. Macro backdrop: 10Y at 4.50% (-2.57% over 5d, falling), DXY 99.20 (+0.24% over 5d, flat) — see the Bonds & USD tab for how this typically translates to ETF. No fresh ticker-specific articles were readable this build; treat this take as background context, not a catalyst.
